about.title: Why United Global Consulting?
about.lead: Today many students lose their chance because of wrong information, broken documents or unreliable consulting.
about.body: Our mission is to guide every student the right way and help them get admitted to an international university. We work with you from the very first step to the last.

why.title: Our advantages
why.subtitle: Your success is our main goal
why.card_1_d: We partner with universities in Korea, Singapore, Europe and more.
why.card_2_d: Every document is carefully reviewed and submitted error-free.
why.card_3_d: From application to embassy — we are with you all the way.
why.card_5_d: Not just one — we pick the best option for you.
why.card_6_d: Our goal is to send you abroad to study.

scholarship.title: Scholarship and grant opportunities
scholarship.subtitle: Don't be afraid of tuition cost — there is a solution
scholarship.lead: Many students are afraid of tuition cost. In reality, many universities offer these options:
scholarship.card_1_d: Partial tuition coverage — discount from 30% up to 70%.
scholarship.card_3_d: A fixed discount on tuition every semester.
scholarship.card_4_d: A grant awarded based on academic performance.
scholarship.cta_note: We help you find the right scholarship for your profile

testimonials.title: Students about us
testimonials.subtitle: 500+ successful students are our best ad
testimonials.t_1: My documents were prepared fast and professionally. I got admitted to Sungkyunkwan University in Korea!
testimonials.t_2: Very grateful. They supported me at every stage and never left me alone.
testimonials.t_3: I got a Full scholarship. United Global — you changed my life!
testimonials.t_4: I had no IELTS, but got admitted to Finland via Duolingo. What looked impossible became reality.
testimonials.t_5: They also prepared me for the visa interview. Got the visa on the first try. Thank you!
testimonials.t_6: I didn't know Japanese but got admitted to an English program. Thanks, United Global!

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions. If yours isn't here — just write us!
faq.a_1: Some universities don't require IELTS or accept alternatives (Duolingo, internal test, etc.). We help you find exactly these programs.
faq.q_2: Is there a chance with low grades?
faq.a_2: Yes. We use an individual approach — we will find universities that match your level.
faq.q_3: Is it hard to get a visa?
faq.a_3: With correct and complete documents, the chance is very high. We support you at every stage.
faq.a_4: In most cases, yes. We build a comfortable payment plan for each student.
faq.q_5: How long does the process take?
faq.a_5: Usually 3–6 months. Some fast-track programs are possible in 1–2 months.
faq.a_6: Bachelor — 17+, Master — 21+. There is practically no upper age limit.

contact.title: Take the first step today
contact.subtitle: Studying abroad won't wait. The one who starts today sees results tomorrow.

exit.title: Leaving already?
exit.body: Leave your phone number — we will call back in 5 minutes and run a free consultation.

cookie.text: We use cookies to improve your experience and for analytics.
cookie.cat_essential_desc: Required for the site to function (theme, language).
cookie.cat_analytics_desc: Anonymous usage stats (GA4, Yandex Metrika) to improve the site.
cookie.cat_marketing_desc: Ad tracking (Meta Pixel, Google Ads) for tailored offers.

calc.title: Estimate your study-abroad budget
calc.subtitle: Pick a country, degree, and housing — we'll show an indicative year-one budget.
calc.note: Figures are indicative; actual costs depend on university, city and lifestyle. Ask us for a bespoke budget.

quiz.title: Which country fits you?
